sqlCommand.descr: Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,TP,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Flex1) (select KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,(case when TP like 'F%' then TP else '' end) as TP,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,BusCat,round(sum(Amt1),2),round(sum(Amt2),2),'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,TP,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,BusCat)
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex1,'') = ''
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
update TransX set Amt4 = 0, Amt5 = 0, Txt = cast(GL as varchar(10)) + ' - Translation Using [yyyy-mm-dd]', Flex1 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set ReinName = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ReinName = '1000013203'

update TransX set Rate1 = (select rate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'MAVG' and Crcy = 'CAD' and EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from CrcyRates where Typ = 'MAVG' and Crcy = 'CAD' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]')) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt3 = round(Amt1 * Rate1,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt6 = round(Amt3 - Amt2,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt7 = 0, Amt8 = 0, Rate2 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update x set Amt7 = y.Amt6 from TransX x inner join (Select KeyID,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,TP,Contract,ReinName,BusCat,round(sum(Amt6),2) as Amt6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' group by KeyID,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,TP,Contract,ReinName,BusCat) y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Crcy = y.Crcy and x.GL = y.GL and x.PC = y.PC and x.UWYR = y.UWYR and x.TP = y.TP and x.Contract = y.Contract and x.ReinName = y.ReinName and x.BusCat = y.BusCat

update x set Amt8 = y.Amt6 from TransX x inner join (Select KeyID,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,TP,Contract,ReinName,BusCat,round(sum(Amt6),2) as Amt6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' group by KeyID,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,TP,Contract,ReinName,BusCat) y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Crcy = y.Crcy and x.GL = y.GL and x.PC = y.PC and x.UWYR = y.UWYR and x.TP = y.TP and x.Contract = y.Contract and x.ReinName = y.ReinName and x.BusCat = y.BusCat

update x set Rate2 = y.Amt6 from TransX x inner join (Select KeyID,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,TP,Contract,ReinName,BusCat,round(sum(Amt6),2) as Amt6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' group by KeyID,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,TP,Contract,ReinName,BusCat) y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Crcy = y.Crcy and x.GL = y.GL and x.PC = y.PC and x.UWYR = y.UWYR and x.TP = y.TP and x.Contract = y.Contract and x.ReinName = y.ReinName and x.BusCat = y.BusCat
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z000'  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt7 = Amt8 and Amt7 = Rate2 and Ledger = 'IF'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt7 = Amt8 and Amt7 = Rate2 and Ledger <> 'IF' and Ledger <> 'Z000'
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z004'  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt7 = Amt8 and Ledger = 'IF'
delete  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt7 = Amt8 and Ledger = 'UG'
update TransX set Assgnmt = GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,2) + '99998' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '4%' or GL like '55%')
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,3) + '9998' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '5%'
update TransX set RefKey3 = 'CB97 ' + cast(GL as varchar(10)) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set RefKey3 = 'CB97 533 ' + cast(UWYR as varchar(4)) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey3 = 'CB97 5339998'
update TransX set RefKey3 = 'CB97 ' + cast(Assgnmt as varchar(10)) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey3 in ('CB97 4099998','CB97 4199998')

insert into TransX (KeyID, RefKey3, Ledger, Crcy, Co, PC, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, ReinName, Assgnmt, Txt, Amt4, Amt5, GL, TTY, Amt6) (Select KeyID, RefKey3, Ledger, Crcy, Co, PC, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, ReinName, Assgnmt, Txt, 0 as Amt4, 0 as Amt5,Descr as GL, Field2 as TTY, Amt6 * cast(Field3 as int) as Amt6 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap7' and BusCat < 30 )

insert into TransX (KeyID, RefKey3, Ledger, Crcy, Co, PC, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, ReinName, Assgnmt, Txt, Amt4, Amt5, GL, TTY, Amt6) (Select KeyID, RefKey3, Ledger, Crcy, Co, PC, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, ReinName, Assgnmt, Txt, 0 as Amt4, 0 as Amt5,Descr as GL, Field2 as TTY, Amt6 * cast(Field3 as int) as Amt6 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap8' and BusCat >= 30 )
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PK = (case when Amt6 < 0 then 50 else 40 end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt6 = 0
